message:
add safe_git.py, turn budgets, agent communication protocol to CLAUDE.md

- scripts/safe_git.py: handles Cowork VM immutable lock files with 3-step
  fallback (clear locks -> alt index -> pending_commits.json)
- CLAUDE.md: added Turn Budget section (Ron 30, Meg/Brock 25, others 20, hard cap 50)
- CLAUDE.md: added Git Operations section (all agents MUST use safe_git.py)
- CLAUDE.md: added Agent Communication Protocol (structured LoreConvo sessions)
- CLAUDE.md: updated session workflow with stronger read-all-agents and structured saves
- Ron scheduled task prompt updated with 30-turn hard limit

standardize all agent prompts, log Debbie decisions, fix marketplace email

- All 10 agent prompts rewritten: no inline Python, safe_git.py, turn budgets,
  dependency maps, explicit inputs/outputs, structured session saves
- DEBBIE_DASHBOARD.md: logged Debbie decisions (Gina review, OPP approvals,
  governance, test file policy, business email)
- marketplace.json: email updated to info@labyrinthanalyticsconsulting.com
- LoreConvo: saved Debbie decisions session (agent:debbie tag)
- docs/internal/AGENT_PROMPT_STANDARD.md: template and dependency map

add pipeline_tracker.py - unified task/item tracking CLI for all agents

- SQLite-backed pipeline database with items + history tables
- Commands: add, update, block, depend, list, show, next
- Smart DB path: repo data/ dir on Mac, auto-fallback to /tmp in Cowork VM
- Reference ID formats: OPP/SEC/MEG/GINA/RON/DEBBIE/PROD-NNN
- Full audit trail via history table
- JSON-based blockers, dependencies, and notes

pipeline_tracker: auto-generate ref IDs, improve help for bare flags

- --ref is now optional on 'add' -- auto-generates OPP-025, RON-012, etc.
  based on highest existing number for that type
- bare --type or --status (no value) now shows valid choices instead of error
- invalid values show helpful error with valid options listed
- new 'types' command shows all types with ref ID prefix and description
- new 'statuses' command shows all statuses with meanings
- help text improved throughout

fix(install): add cryptography dep to pyproject.toml; wire get_tier MCP tool

SEC-014: cryptography package was missing from dependencies in both
loreconvo and loredocs pyproject.toml files. uvx installs loreconvo/loredocs
from pyproject.toml -- without cryptography declared, the license.py import
fails at server startup with ImportError, breaking the plugin install flow.

Stability TODO #2: expose get_tier/@mcp.tool in loreconvo/server.py
and get_license_tier/@mcp.tool in loredocs/server.py. Both call
get_license_status() from the respective license.py module. Allows
Debbie to verify Pro key is loaded and valid without inferring from
behavior. Named get_license_tier in loredocs to avoid clash with the
existing internal get_tier function imported from .tiers.

MEG-038: verified unused import (Encoding/PublicFormat) already removed
from a prior commit -- no fix needed.
fix: standardize all timeouts to 30 seconds per spec
fix: correct template override logic and remove unused import
Jacqueline PM dashboard 2026-04-05: ACTION REQUIRED posture, MEG-041 escalated, pipeline status updated
gina: product review 2026-04-05 -- YELLOW, GINA-001/002 still open

fix: GINA-001/SEC-017 -- vault_set_tier now validates license before persisting Pro tier

vault_set_tier previously allowed any caller to write 'pro' to config.json
without a valid license key. get_tier() reads config.json as a fallback when
LOREDOCS_PRO env var is not set, creating a bypass path.

Fix: vault_set_tier now calls get_license_status() before calling set_tier()
when upgrading to Pro. If no valid license (or dev bypass) is active, returns
an error with instructions to set LOREDOCS_PRO and get a license key.

Downgrade to free still works without a license (no gate needed).
All 39 LoreDocs tests pass.
Add enhancement pipeline type + Debbie-direct flow to pipeline guide
Require project='side_hustle' in all agent save_session calls
docs(john): add path/env/script/tag documentation standards to John SKILL.md
fix MEG-043/044/045: test paths, tool count assertions, doc updates
gina: product review 2026-04-06 -- YELLOW, GINA-001/002 resolved, GINA-003 new
Jacqueline PM dashboard 2026-04-06: MILESTONE Stability Mandate complete, 3 silent agents flagged, pipeline updated
competitive-intel: scan 2026-04-06 -- Claude-Mem HIGH threat, Hindsight Claude Code integration, LoreScope white space confirmed

fix: Stability Mandate install scripts + MEG-043b/046 test regressions

- LoreConvo install.sh: replace pip install -r requirements.txt with pip install .
  to create entry point binary (loreconvo). Add stale-venv detection and auto-recreate.
  Fixes root cause of Stability Mandate plugin load failures.
- LoreDocs install.sh: create new installer (was missing entirely). Uses pip install .
  to install loredocs package and create entry point binary. Same stale-venv guard.
- MEG-043b: fix _get_loreconvo_path() in test_generate_license_key.py to use
  .parent.parent.parent (3 levels) not .parent.parent (2 levels). All 3 roundtrip
  tests now pass.
- MEG-046: fix _server_tool_names() in test_readme_tools.py to extract actual tool
  names (explicit via name= arg, implicit via def name). Was returning literal
  '@mcp.tool' strings causing false set-comparison failures. All 7 README tests pass.
rewrite: blog_loredocs_vault_architecture -- soften unshipped features, add cost beat, restructure
calendar: update week 1 status with blog_loredocs rewrite completion note (Apr 6)
